channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ad-free Amazon Prime Video gets a price bump and a rebrand in the US — while 4K streaming becomes exclusive to the paid tier
item.description: If you want to go ad-free on Prime Video in the US, you're going to have to pay more starting next month.

item.title: Kindle Colorsoft Signature Edition : le prix de la première liseuse couleur d’Amazon, avec 32 Go de stockage, fond de 28 % pendant les ventes flash
item.description: C'est fin 2024 que la Kindle est enfin passée à la couleur. Voici donc la Kindle Colorsoft, disponible en version Signature Edition avec un stockage très important, que l'on trouve à 214,99 euros au lieu de 299,99 euros pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon.

item.title: Norda 001A G+ Trail Running Shoe Review: As Expensive as an Apple Watch
item.description: Do you really need a $300 trail running shoe? We test the treads, and the creds, of the Norda 001A G+.

item.title: Ireland vs Scotland Free Streams: How to watch Six Nations 2026 game, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Ireland vs Scotland live streams online – including for FREE – as both sides can still win the Six Nations 2026, plus the Triple Crown.

item.title: Mauvaise nouvelle si vous envoyez des messages via Instagram
item.description: Meta arrête le support du chiffrement de bout en bout pour les messages directs d'Instagram après le 8 mai 2026. La décision est définitive. Récupérez vos données pendant qu’il est encore temps.

item.title: I Regret to Inform You That You’re Using an Inferior Pour-Over Coffee Brewer
item.description: The unique flat-bottom design of the Kalita Wave makes brewing exceptional coffee dead simple—especially if you can’t summon the rigor required to make perfect pour-over.

item.title: ICYMI: the week's 7 biggest tech news stories from Sonos' big return to our review of the 'impressively premium' MacBook Neo
item.description: The week's biggest tech news stories from Apple, Google, Sonos, DJI, and more for March 14, 2026.

item.title: I’ll never travel without my favorite sleep earbuds again
item.description: The Soundcore Sleep A20s are our favorite budget sleep earbuds, and they're my go-to travel essential.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs smartphones Xiaomi, Redmi Note et Poco en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous êtes perdus dans les nombreux téléphones de la marque ? Nous avons testé et sélectionné au sein du vaste catalogue les meilleures références pour vous aider à choisir le bon smartphone Xiaomi, Redmi ou Poco.

item.title: Coup dur pour la confidentialité : Instagram supprime le chiffrement de bout en bout dans ses messages privés
item.description: Les discussions en messages privés dans Instagram vont être privées de toute confidentialité : Meta a en effet décidé de supprimer le chiffrement de bout en bout dans Instagram. Et renvoie les plus soucieux de leur vie privée vers WhatsApp, qui reste heureusement complètement sécurisé.

item.title: La Lune accueillera peut-être ses premiers habitants dans des maisons gonflables...
item.description: La Nasa réfléchit aux habitats qui pourront être utilisés sur la Lune une fois que des missions habitées y seront menées. Résultat : des entreprises travaillent sur un système de modules qui seraient gonflables.

item.title: How to Watch March Madness 2026
item.description: Tune in to watch the men’s and women’s teams fight to win the 2026 NCAA Division I Basketball championship.

item.title: Japan Approves the World’s First Treatment Made With Reprogrammed Human Cells
item.description: Researchers in Japan pioneered reprogrammed cells 20 years ago. Now the country has given the first-ever authorizations to manufacture and sell medical products based on the technology.

item.title: Spring Cleaning? Here's How to Declutter Responsibly—and Maybe Earn Some Cash
item.description: Declutter and deep clean your home sanely by breaking it into smaller tasks. You're also bound to discover there are things you no longer need that you can sell.

item.title: Amazon's new Health AI Chatbot is rife with potential for misuse — here's why I wouldn't trust it with my data
item.description: Amazon's new Health AI will recommend you Amazon Pharmacy products and train itself on your conversations.

item.title: How It Hits: Are horror musicals the future?
item.description: Sinners earned huge box office success and 16 Oscar nominations. Could it launch a new era of horror musicals?

item.title: Review: The new M5 MacBook Air is incredible. I wish it was $200 cheaper.
item.description: The M5 MacBook Air is blazing fast for an Air, which is its biggest strength and only real flaw. Let us explain.

item.title: This $160,000 red-light chamber left my whole body buzzing
item.description: The Ammortal Chamber combines red light, molecular hydrogen, PEMF, and vibroacoustics, and I got to try it at SXSW 2026.

item.title: Space-traveling microbes? An unusual experiment shocked skeptics.
item.description: A Johns Hopkins University experiment funded by NASA shows some extremophiles could survive the blast off a planet hit by asteroid.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone has hit a record-low price this weekend — save $500 at Amazon
item.description: This DJI Mini 5 Pro drone camera is on sale this weeked for $1,099. That's the record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: Never After Dark review: Satisfying scares fuel this slow-burn ghost story
item.description: Satisfying scares fuel a slow-burn ghost story in "Never After Dark," which is playing SXSW. Review.

item.title: An alpine divorce isnt a dark joke. Its a calculated escalation of control.
item.description: What is an alpine divorce? Trauma experts explain the psychology behind abusers abandoning partners in the wilderness.

item.title: Pi Day 2026 deals: Score free food from Burger King, 7-Eleven, DoorDash, Papa Johns, and more
item.description: The best Pi Day 2026 deals. Get free food from Burger King, 7-Eleven, DoorDash, Papa John's, and more.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 Oscars online for free
item.description: How to watch Oscars for free. Live stream the 2026 Oscars for free from anywhere in the world.
